subject: [PATCH v3 4/4] mm: align file-backed mmap to exec folio order in thp_get_unmapped_area

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the fallback logic, suggesting that it might not work correctly when exec_folio_order() returns a value greater than PAGE_SIZE. Asked for clarification on the expected behavior.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch series addresses an issue where shared libraries loaded by ld.so via mmap() get 64K-aligned virtual addresses, preventing contpte mapping even when large folios are allocated with properly aligned file offsets and physical addresses. The patch introduces a fallback in thp_get_unmapped_area_vmflags() that uses exec_folio_order() to determine alignment, matching the readahead allocation strategy. This aligns mappings to the hardware TLB coalescing size, capped to the mapping length via rounddown_pow_of_two(len).
